inline_comments.message:
This is not consistent with https://git.onap.org/dcaegen2/platform/blueprints/tree/blueprints/k8s-datafile.yaml?h=guilin 

Is this update required for guilin? 

Also would prefer all blueprint updates made under blueprint repo and this file be removed from this repo.

The change is not really required for Guilin. Jerzy made a merge request for docs with updated procedure of acquiring certificates for FTPeS communication ( https://gerrit.onap.org/r/c/dcaegen2/+/115031 we can continue there), and I think cherry-picking those into Guilin and Frankfurt would be enough.
We'll update Honolulu docs for CMPv2 later when we finalize blueprint and component-spec updates.
